title: [FIRRTL] Add parsing support for reference types + operations currently supported.
body:
Map to current IR constructs.
* Using connect/refconnect instead of define (let emitConnect handle).
* rwprobe and probe both become ref.send (firrtl.ref).
* IR forbids references in aggregates.
* ref.sub for subindex/subfield through aggregate.
* ref statements
  * put into internalPaths on F{Int,Ext}Module's.

Missing:
* force and friends
* aggregates-of-references (not supported in IR / passes presently) 

While rest is implemented/supported, pro-actively reject some constructs (under test):
* Rejects probe of non-passive until #4801 / known to be well-supported.
* connects don't model "define" semantics yet, reject if target is not in same block as define.
* Reject input probes until not an easy path to unexpected / problematic behavior.
* Non-identical probes cannot be define'd yet.


Add tests.
